title: orthothecium viscidum
intro: Orthothecium viscidum is a species of moss belonging to the family Orthotheciaceae, commonly known as the webbing moss. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits associated with Orthothecium viscidum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Orthothecium viscidum can be found in the form of tea, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
